plugins.prepareCmd: npm --prefix packages/parser version --no-git-tag-version ${nextRelease.version} && npm --prefix packages/generator version --no-git-tag-version ${nextRelease.version} && npm --prefix packages/validator version --no-git-tag-version ${nextRelease.version}
plugins.publishCmd: DIST_TAG="${nextRelease.channel || 'latest'}" && pnpm --filter claude-code-jsonl-parser publish --access public --no-git-checks --ignore-scripts --tag "$DIST_TAG" && pnpm --filter claude-code-jsonl-generator publish --access public --no-git-checks --ignore-scripts --tag "$DIST_TAG" && pnpm --filter claude-code-jsonl-validator publish --access public --no-git-checks --ignore-scripts --tag "$DIST_TAG"
